2026-06-30JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Supreme Court of Nova Scotia (Family Division), and a Judge ex officio of the Nova Scotia Court of AppealAppointment of Charlene J. Moore of the city of Dartmouth, in the Province of Nova Scotia, one of His Majesty's Counsel learned in the law, to be a Judge of the Supreme Court of Nova Scotia (Family Division), and a Judge ex officio of the Nova Scotia Court of Appeal.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Supreme Court of Nova Scotia (Family Division), and a Judge ex officio of the Nova Scotia Court of Appeal
precis: Appointment of Charlene J. Moore of the city of Dartmouth, in the Province of Nova Scotia, one of His Majesty's Counsel learned in the law, to be a Judge of the Supreme Court of Nova Scotia (Family Division), and a Judge ex officio of the Nova Scotia Court of Appeal.
